Facade output → warpui::platform::android::Window::push_frame wiring (PTY bytes → terminal model → renderer)
DCS hook parser implementation (ESC P $ d ... 0x9c) for Block boundary detection
Bootstrap zsh_body.sh DCS hook ship + integration into APK assets
Block model: start_time + command + exit_code populated correctly (M3 Acceptance #3)
Live ls -la /system test on S24 Ultra: colored output + line-wrapped (M3 Acceptance #1)
Scrollback ≥1000 lines + 60fps touch-drag scroll (M3 Acceptance #2 — flagship pathway)
APK size budget: release ≤80MB (excluding bootstrap zip), ≤120MB combined (M3 Acceptance #4)

M3 close-out integration document per M2-go-no-go.md template
out: Mobile UX polish — selection / accessory row / block gestures (M5)
AI integration Haiku ghost-text + Sonnet agent (M6)
M2-S13 Pixel 4a/A52s low-end re-run (USER CHOICE — deferred indefinitely per 「先跳過便宜手機」 directive 2026-04-30)
Mid-tier S21+ device verification (deferred to post-M3 polish; flagship-only for M3)
Warp Drive / Warp Cloud sync (proprietary; v3+)

stories.title: warp_terminal_mobile_facade real impl (Session API + AppContext + FeatureFlag + SSH-noop)
acceptanceCriteria: warp-src/crates/warp_terminal_mobile_facade/Cargo.toml has real deps (was M0 placeholder); cdylib not required (rlib for app/ to consume)
src/lib.rs exposes Session::spawn(cmd: &str, env: &[(&str,&str)]) -> Session, Session::write(&[u8]), Session::read(&mut [u8]) -> Result<usize>
src/app_context.rs: AppContext mobile shim — minimal subset of warp app::AppContext satisfying warp_terminal needs (no AI, no SSH, no feature_flag dispatch)
src/feature_flag.rs: FeatureFlag mobile shim — returns hardcoded values (terminal_enabled=true, ai_enabled=false, blocks_enabled=true)
src/ssh_noop.rs: SSH provider that returns Unsupported on all calls (mobile doesn't ship SSH in v1)
Build verification: cargo doc --no-deps -p warp_terminal_mobile_facade succeeds; cargo ndk -t arm64-v8a check -p warp_terminal_mobile_facade succeeds; ≥1 unit test stubs all desktop deps
Cargo.lock unchanged for warp_terminal/warpui deps (no upstream edge churn)
Web search docs cited (warp upstream AppContext/FeatureFlag patterns; mobile shim precedents)
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

warp_terminal_mobile_facade adds new app_terminal::* module tree containing extracted Block, BlockList, ANSI parser (incl dcs_hooks), and minimal Session glue from app/src/terminal/model/* — NOT a re-export, but a copy-and-adapt to compile standalone for Android

Use cfg(target_os = "android") only where the extracted code itself needs platform-specific handling (e.g. PTY traits) — most extracted code should be platform-neutral and compile cleanly under cargo ndk check
Web search docs cited (Cargo workspace member crates with copied source; legal/license note that AGPL allows copying within same workspace under same license)

stories.title: DCS hook frame parser + ANSI streaming (post Amendment 5)
stories.verifiedBy: codex round-3 PASS @ warp-src b65ccee + main 6a68c41 (3 rounds: AC#7 amend + truecolor + unknown DCS + cap overflow + empty 7-bit ST)
acceptanceCriteria: Per Plan Amendment 5: DCS schema already extracted into facade::app_terminal::ansi::dcs_hooks (M3-S03 v2 commit c76f876). M3-S05 adds the streaming frame detector + hex decoder + dispatch.

Implement streaming DCS detection in TerminalModel::ingest_pty_bytes: state machine recognizes ESC P dollar d <hex_chars> ST (where ST = 0x9c or ESC backslash); accumulates hex bytes; on ST: hex-decode body and call DProtoHook::deserialize. **Non-Warp DCS sequences (any other markers) MUST use an ignore-until-ST state — do NOT route through DcsRaw/finish_dcs which can increment parse errors and dcs_hook_count counters.**

Wire DProtoHook events: Precmd marks new pending block start (deferred to S07); Preexec records command text/start_time (deferred to S07); CommandFinished sets exit_code + finalizes Block (deferred to S07). For S05 baseline: just log/emit DProtoHook events; full Block aggregation in S07.

Add minimal ANSI streaming parser for plain-text + cursor-positioning + SGR color attributes. Specifically support: CSI n m (SGR), CSI n;m H (cursor pos), CSI K (erase line), newline carriage-return backspace tab. Ignore unknown CSI sequences gracefully (do not print). **For SGR truecolor/256-color: when seeing 38;2;R;G;B or 48;2;R;G;B (24-bit) or 38;5;N or 48;5;N (256-color), MUST skip the operand triplet/index — do NOT parse R/G/B/N as independent SGR codes (which would incorrectly apply 2 as dim, 0 as reset, etc).**

Renderer integration choice: keep Option A static_grid baseline OR flip to Option B dynamic_grid.rs. Worker decides based on per-cell distinct rendering needs. If Option B: new file warp-src/crates/warpui/src/platform/android/dynamic_grid.rs that supports per-cell color/glyph from terminal model cells.

Tests: at least 3 new tests feeding actual zsh_body.sh hex JSON DCS samples (lines 80, 254, 301 from warp-src/app/assets/bundled/bootstrap/zsh_body.sh) through the parser; verify DProtoHook Precmd / Preexec / CommandFinished are correctly emitted

**AC#7 (AMENDED 2026-04-30 post codex round-1)**: Verification: cargo ndk check -p warp_terminal_mobile_facade + warpui passes; cargo test passes (at least 17 tests total); device test on S24 Ultra R5CX10VFFBA passes the parser/device-log gate (sgr_apply_count >=4 + dcs_hook_count >=2 + dcs_error_count == 0 + per-event sgr_color logs showing fg=0xCC0000FF for code 31, fg=0x4E9A06FF for code 32, fg=0x3465A4FF for code 34, fg=0xFFFFFFFF for reset). **On-screen per-cell colored rendering is DEFERRED to M3-S08 (the per-cell renderer story) — that story gates final visual rendering acceptance.** This amendment is justified by the parser/render scope split: M3-S05 owns the intelligence layer (correctness via parser tests + device logcat); M3-S08 owns the rendering layer (visual via screenshot + ls -la /system).
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: Bootstrap zsh_body.sh ship as APK asset + readable from PTY context (Plan Amendment 5 + zsh deferral)
stories.verifiedBy: codex round-2 PASS @ 544e8bf (atomic extraction + Gate 4b PTY-context exercise)
acceptanceCriteria: Per Plan Amendment 5 + M3-S03-v2 archeology: zsh_body.sh ALREADY exists upstream at warp-src/app/assets/bundled/bootstrap/zsh_body.sh (lines 80, 254, 301 emit hex JSON DCS hooks). M3-S06 = SHIP existing asset, NOT write new hooks.

Asset packaging: copy warp-src/app/assets/bundled/bootstrap/zsh_body.sh to android/app/src/main/assets/warp/zsh_body.sh via Gradle copy task (similar pattern to M2-S02 jniLibs Gradle copy). APK packaging includes the asset.

Runtime accessibility: APK asset readable from PTY context via AssetManager.open("warp/zsh_body.sh") + write to /data/data/dev.warp.mobile/files/warp/zsh_body.sh on first launch (or AssetFileDescriptor pattern). Add JNI export Java_dev_warp_mobile_NativeBridge_extractWarpAssets if needed.

Hook execution constraint (DEFERRED to M5 Termux Runtime): S24 Ultra has only /system/bin/sh (mksh) — no zsh available. zsh_body.sh requires zsh's precmd/preexec mechanism. M3-S06 ships the asset and verifies it's loadable but does NOT verify hook execution end-to-end. Hook execution gate moves to M5 when Termux brings zsh.

Verification: APK contains assets/warp/zsh_body.sh (verify via `unzip -l app-debug.apk | grep zsh_body.sh`); first-launch extracts to /data/data/dev.warp.mobile/files/warp/zsh_body.sh (verify via adb shell ls); shell-out script in PTY can `cat` the file (verify via logcat showing some bytes from the file content).
Web search docs cited (Android AssetManager API; Termux package availability for zsh; AGPL asset bundling compliance).
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: Block model extract + DCS event aggregation (Plan Amendment 5; M3 Acceptance #3)
stories.verifiedBy: codex round-1 PASS @ warp-src d943f1c + main 2d73979 (M3 Acceptance #3 met on S24U)
acceptanceCriteria: Per Plan Amendment 5: extract app::terminal::model::block + blocks into facade::app_terminal::model::block + blocks (continuing M3-S03-v2 extraction pattern). Block struct fields: start_time / command / exit_code / output_range — verify upstream app::terminal::model::Block struct shape.

DCS parser from M3-S05 emits BlockEvent on hook delivery: Precmd → BlockEvent::Start(start_time, command_placeholder); Preexec → fills in command; CommandFinished → BlockEvent::End(exit_code) — wire through TerminalModel::ingest_pty_bytes after DProtoHook::deserialize.

Block aggregation in TerminalModel: maintain Vec<Block>; on Start emit new block; on End update current block exit_code + finalize. Test via synthetic DCS injection (TerminalSimulationReceiver TERM_INJECT_RAW from M3-S05) since S24U has no zsh.
JNI debug accessor: Java_dev_warp_mobile_NativeBridge_terminalBlocksDump returns JSON array of {start_time, command, exit_code} for current Vec<Block> state.

Hook execution constraint (DEFERRED to M5 Termux per M3-S06 amendment): real zsh hooks via PTY require zsh which is M5. M3-S07 verification uses synthetic DCS injection per the M3-S05 path; AC#4 zsh sample run moves to M5.

Verification (M3 Acceptance #3): inject 3 synthetic DCS sequences mirroring zsh ls/whoami/false flow (Precmd + Preexec + CommandFinished triplets, exit codes 0/0/1) via TerminalSimulationReceiver; verify 3 Block entries via terminalBlocksDump + each has correct command + exit_code.
Driver: tools/scripts/test-block-model.sh <serial> drives synthetic injection + verification; result.json with block_count, command_match[], exit_code_match[], gate.overall_pass.
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: Per-cell dynamic_grid renderer + Live ls -la /system on S24U (M3 Acceptance #1, post-amend)
acceptanceCriteria: Build warp-src/crates/warpui/src/platform/android/dynamic_grid.rs (NEW): per-cell renderer that reads from TerminalModel.cells() with SGR fg/bg/attrs honored. Reuses M2-S07 glyph atlas + cosmic-text shaping. The static_grid M2-S08 path stays untouched (M2 acceptance held).
Window::push_frame routing: prefer dynamic_grid when TerminalModel has non-default cells (i.e. PTY-driven content); fall back to static_grid for the M2-S08 demo flow when terminal_mode flag is false.

Per-cell color verification (synthetic SGR injection): inject \x1b[31mRED\x1b[32mGREEN\x1b[34mBLUE\x1b[0m via TerminalSimulationReceiver TERM_INJECT_RAW; capture screenshot; visual inspection shows distinct red/green/blue text in their respective cells (NOT the M3-S05 static_grid replication artifact).
Line wrap on real PTY: spawn /system/bin/sh; run `/system/bin/ls -la /system\n`; output wraps at 80-col boundary; ≥40 lines visible on screen (or scrollable; scrollback test is M3-S09).

Toybox ls color limitation DEFERRED to M5: Android's stock toybox /system/bin/ls does NOT emit ANSI colors even with --color=always. M3-S08 verifies per-cell color rendering via synthetic SGR injection (above); M5 Termux brings GNU coreutils ls --color=auto for full real-PTY colored verification.

Linux baseline pixel similarity gate DEFERRED to M5: requires a Linux reference render with matching font/cell-size which is out of scope for M3-S08. M3-S08 verifies functional correctness (per-cell colors visible + line-wrap + ≥40 ls lines rendered) instead of pixel-equality.

Driver: tools/scripts/test-dynamic-grid.sh R5CX10VFFBA — install APK, launch terminal_mode, inject RED/GREEN/BLUE synthetic SGR, capture screenshot.png; spawn ls -la /system, capture screenshot-ls.png; emit result.json with sgr_color_test_pass, ls_lines_visible, gate.overall_pass.
Result artifact: .omc/m3-artifacts/M3-S08-color-test.png (synthetic SGR), M3-S08-ls-output.png (real ls), M3-S08-result.json (gate evidence).
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

acceptanceCriteria: tools/scripts/test-pkg-install.sh <serial> drives end-to-end test on S24 Ultra R5CX10VFFBA
Step 1: Spawn shell ($PREFIX/bin/zsh per M4-S06)
Step 2: pkg install git → success; git --version returns 2.x
Step 3: pkg install python → success; python3 --version returns 3.x
Step 4: git clone https://github.com/octocat/Hello-World.git /tmp/test-clone → success (closes ralplan §M4 verification step 'Fresh-install app → run pkg install git && git clone ...')
result.json with packages_installed, install_time_ms_per_pkg, gate.overall_pass
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: M3 carry-over: Option D shared-rlib API split (resolves 6 cross-workspace dups)
acceptanceCriteria: Per M3-S11 round-1 codex finding: introduce warp_terminal_mobile_facade_android_link rlib in warp-src/crates/ that exposes platform/android types as a public API
Both warpui (canonical) and android-host (mirror) consume this rlib instead of mirroring sources
Removes 4 M2-era dups (font_render.rs, static_grid.rs, ime.rs, input.rs) + 2 M3 carry-forwards (terminal_model.rs, dynamic_grid.rs)
Cargo.lock zero churn on warp_terminal/warpui/facade upstream edges (architecture invariant maintained)
If Option D introduces Metal transitive deps that break cargo ndk check (the original M2-S04 blocker): document failure + escalate to milestone scope review
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: M4 close-out integration document
acceptanceCriteria: .omc/m4-artifacts/M4-go-no-go.md per M3-go-no-go.md template
§1 Story Ledger: all 14 M4 stories (S01-S15) with PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL + commit hash
§2 Architecture state at M4 close: Termux $PREFIX layout; Option D shared-rlib structure (if M4-S12 PASS); 0 cross-workspace dups
§3 Per-layer GO/CONDITIONAL/NO-GO: L0 PTY service unchanged; L1 warpui Android renderer unchanged; L2 facade now consumes Option D rlib; L3 Termux runtime NEW
§4 Performance baselines: bootstrap install time, pkg install time per package, APK combined size
§5 M5 carry-overs (mobile UX layer)
§6 Final verdict GO / CONDITIONAL GO / NO-GO with rationale

§8 SOP lessons learned (M4 specific)

verifierConfig.rationale: User SOP from M0/M1/M2: every worker deliverable goes through Codex review. M2-S11 process violation lesson (worker self-PASS exposed by lead audit) makes lead-dispatched codex AFTER fix the canonical pattern for M3+. Web doc lookup precedes implementation per 「搭配 codex 和網路搜索相關文檔和資訊」.
